category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Sri Lanka SLSI mandatory certification, SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, and SLSEA energy labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Sri Lanka requirements: SLSI mandatory certification and SLS mark, SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, SLSEA energy label and MEPS, R-600a refrigerant handling, and importer/market-access obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与斯里兰卡要求差距对照：SLSI强制认证及SLS标志、SLS/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、SLSEA能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）、R-600a制冷剂处理及进口商/市场准入义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與斯里蘭卡要求差距對照：SLSI強制認證及SLS標誌、SLS/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、SLSEA能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）、R-600a製冷劑處理及進口商/市場准入義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Sri Lanka legislation, SLSI certification and import-inspection requirements, SLS/IEC standards, and SLSEA energy-efficiency provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡法律、SLSI认证与进口检验要求、SLS/IEC标准及SLSEA能效条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡法律、SLSI認證與進口檢驗要求、SLS/IEC標準及SLSEA能效條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Sri Lanka compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety certification under the SLSI scheme to SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically accepted, though IEC 60335-2-24 alignment and an IECEE CB test report can ease conformity; (2) SLSEA energy labelling and Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) does not satisfy the Sri Lanka energy label, which requires a star rating registered with the Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority; (3) SLSI mandatory import certification and inspection plus affixing the SLS mark before customs clearance via a Sri Lanka-resident importer; and (4) refrigerant documentation — R-600a (isobutane) is widely used and compatible, but charge and flammability documentation to IEC 60335-2-24 must be confirmed. Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regimes for refrigerators.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大斯里兰卡合规差距：（1）依据SLS/IEC 60335-2-24在SLSI制度下进行电气安全认证——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动接受，但与IEC 60335-2-24的对齐及IECEE CB检测报告可简化合格评定；（2）SLSEA能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）——中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）不满足斯里兰卡能效标签，后者要求向斯里兰卡可持续能源管理局（SLSEA）注册的星级评定；（3）SLSI强制进口认证和检验，并须经斯里兰卡本地进口商在清关前加贴SLS标志；（4）制冷剂文件——R-600a（异丁烷）被广泛使用且兼容，但须确认依据IEC 60335-2-24的充注量及可燃性文件。斯里兰卡对电冰箱没有类似欧盟的横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声法规。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大斯里蘭卡合規差距：（1）依據SLS/IEC 60335-2-24在SLSI制度下進行電氣安全認證——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動接受，但與IEC 60335-2-24的對齊及IECEE CB檢測報告可簡化合格評定；（2）SLSEA能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）——中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）不滿足斯里蘭卡能效標籤，後者要求向斯里蘭卡可持續能源管理局（SLSEA）登記的星級評定；（3）SLSI強制進口認證和檢驗，並須經斯里蘭卡本地進口商在清關前加貼SLS標誌；（4）製冷劑文件——R-600a（異丁烷）被廣泛使用且相容，但須確認依據IEC 60335-2-24的充注量及可燃性文件。斯里蘭卡對電冰箱沒有類似歐盟的橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲法規。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly until human_reviewed is set to true
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (SLSI, SLSEA, Sri Lanka Customs, IEC). Local PDFs not accepted. verified must be set true with a named reviewer before human_reviewed can be true.
